markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX as a partner for ASU's AI Search (AEO) strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Need:** ASU's Learning Enterprise needs an intentional AEO strategy for its non-degree offerings (e.g., Universal Learner Courses), as current AI visibility is purely organic.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX proposes an end-to-end service, acting as an "extension of your content team" to research, create, and optimize content for AI search at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX uses a proprietary platform with custom workflows and human oversight for deep research, fact-checking, and brand voice adherence, differentiating it from simple LLM tools.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** ASU will sync internally on the fit and budget, then follow up to schedule a demo.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### ASU Learning Enterprise Context

  - [**Mission:** Owns all non-degree offerings (career learning, certificates, K-12 pathways) across three pillars:](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
      - [Universal Pathways](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [Career & Professional Learning](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [Emerging Learning Solutions (grant-funded)](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build an intentional AEO strategy to drive registrations for key offerings, starting with Universal Learner Courses (ULC).](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Tech Stack:** Complex, but AEO is expected to be a standalone service, not requiring deep integration.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**B2C Marketing:** Salesforce Marketing Cloud](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**B2B Marketing:** HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Data:** BigQuery](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**CRM:** Salesforce Sales Cloud](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

### GrowthX's AEO Solution

  - [**Service Model:** An end-to-end service for AEO content, not a tech platform for internal teams.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):** Develop a content roadmap and publish 5–10 initial articles.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
    2.  [**Growth Execution:** Publish 5 new articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Platform Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [**Inputs:** Custom "artifacts" (personas, style guides, voice/tone) provide deep context.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [**Research:** A research agent performs 30-minute deep dives, generating a bibliography.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** A separate agent validates every passage against a confidence interval.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [**Human Oversight:** Experts make manual edits to ensure quality and nuance.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [**Pricing:** Standard enterprise software pricing (5 articles/week) may be too high for ASU's initial test. GrowthX is open to a custom model for a single offering.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**ASU Team:** Sync internally on the fit and budget for a potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**ASU Team:** Follow up to schedule a demo if the partnership is viable.](https://fathom.video/share/6zX8oxJgvmeuLn1w-wVbczvzdsnDjHPj?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
